label: Seamglass Meridian
description: Seamglass Meridian is a littoral city founded along a fault-limned basin where Lacrymara’s luminous seam-lines converge into a stable radiance gradient. Its architecture consists of low, faceted structures clad in dust-slick vitrified tiles that channel electrostatic glass fallouts into grounded gutters and lensing cisterns. Broad causeways of fused silicate span shallow reflective shallows, turning the copper-white twilight into calibrated bands used for navigation and local timekeeping. An outer ring of mirror pylons tracks the planet’s auroral girdle, fixing the city’s profile against Vesperglass System’s orderly halo geometry.
